# AssignedWorkDocumentElement

**Protocol**

An element of an [doc://com.apple.Assignables/documentation/Assignables/AssignedWorkDocument].

## Declaration

```swift
protocol AssignedWorkDocumentElement : DocumentElement
```

## Document elements

- **DocumentElement**: Represents an element that is contained within a document. Such elements can have identifiers that uniquely identify them within a document.
- **BasicDocumentElementID**: A default implementation for a document element identifier.
- **DocumentElementID**: An identifier for an element in a document.
- **AssignableDocumentElement**: An element of an [doc://com.apple.Assignables/documentation/Assignables/AssignableDocument].

## Inherits From

- DocumentElement
- Equatable
- Hashable

## Conforming Types

- AssignedWorkDocument.Page
- AssignedWorkDocument.ScoreAnnotation
